metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills — data exploration, multi-dimensional research, and incremental build pipelines

plugins.name: schema-scout
plugins.description: CLI tool for exploring the schema and values of any data file (XLSX, CSV, JSON). Auto-detects JSON in cells, repairs double-encoded UTF-8, prunes overflow artifacts.

plugins.name: miltiaze
plugins.description: Multi-dimensional idea exploration — decomposes concepts into research angles, investigates each thoroughly with verified sources, presents multiple solutions with honest tradeoffs.

plugins.name: ladder-build
plugins.description: Incremental build pipeline — decomposes projects into small verifiable milestones. Build, test, verify each rung before climbing to the next.

plugins.name: repo-audit
plugins.description: Repo audit and cross-cutting amendment protocol — read-only codebase analysis plus enforced change workflow with snapshot and pattern lookup consultation.

plugins.name: mk-cc-all
plugins.description: All mk-cc-resources skills in one install: Schema Scout, Miltiaze, Ladder Build, and Repo Audit.
